name: Michel de Souza
title: Software Engineer in Transition · Operations & Security Professional
summary: Software Engineer in career transition, grounded in Harvard's CS50x rigor and a philosophy of defensive architecture and high-quality engineering processes. After a solid trajectory managing real-time service systems as a Concierge and Travel Agent, I transitioned into full-stack development — building production-grade applications with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and SQL. Trilingual (English, Spanish, Portuguese), operations-minded, and driven by the challenge of turning pure logic into efficient, real-world solutions.

experience.title: Concierge & Front Desk Associate
bullets: Served as primary point of contact for all client inquiries, ensuring prompt and professional resolution across multiple priorities.
Monitored building security through CCTV surveillance systems, identifying and escalating incidents proactively.
Coordinated with service vendors for timely maintenance repairs and facilities upkeep.
Managed full package logistics cycle — receiving, logging, storing, and notifying residents using service management software.
Translated client feedback into actionable workflow improvements across cross-functional teams.

experience.title: Travel Agent & Founder
bullets: Founded and operated an independent travel agency serving Spanish and Portuguese-speaking clients in the Newark metro area.
Built Michel's Travel — a full-stack flight booking platform using React, TypeScript, Node.js, Drizzle ORM, and Tailwind CSS.
Implemented engineering DOGMAs: No Silent Failures, Zod input validation, and External Service Isolation via SOLID principles.
Managed end-to-end client relationships, itinerary planning, and real-time logistics coordination.

experience.title: Travel Agent
bullets: Provided full-service travel planning and booking for a diverse, multilingual client base.
Specialized in Latin American routes, cruise packages, and international itineraries.

experience.title: Bilingual Receptionist
bullets: Delivered bilingual (English/Spanish) front desk support, managing scheduling, client intake, and communications.

experience.title: Driver
bullets: Maintained a top-rated driver profile through consistent service quality and multilingual communication.

experience.title: Crew Steward
bullets: Delivered premium hospitality service aboard international cruise ships, working within a multicultural crew environment.

experience.title: Quality & Service Technician
bullets: Promoted to Quality & Service Technician within first contract role after completing military service.
Ensured food quality standards and service consistency during high-volume promotional periods.
Trained and supported front-line staff in fast-paced, customer-facing operations.
Built foundational skills in hospitality, teamwork, and operational excellence.

projects.name: Michel's Travel Platform
projects.description: Full-stack flight booking platform built with React, TypeScript, Node.js, Drizzle ORM, and Tailwind CSS. Follows strict engineering principles: explicit error handling, Zod schema validation, and SOLID architecture with Dependency Inversion.
